protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: Hemolysis reactions... incubated at 37°C... centrifuged... to pellet unlysed cells... detergent reaction... containing 1% Triton X-100

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: Ghosts were made by lysing cells hypotonically... and washing three to four times... ghosts were pelleted at 16,000 × g

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: Ghosts resuspended in... lysis buffer were resealed... incubation on ice... then at 37°C... Resealed ghosts (RGs) were washed

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: PEG washout... reactions were centrifuged... washed by gently resuspending... centrifuged... resuspended... and centrifuged

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: Leakage from RGs... reactions... incubated at 37°C... chilled on ice... diluted... and analyzed by flow cytometry

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: reaction end points were spotted... covered with a coverslip, and imaged immediately

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: Trypsin sensitivity of μ1... digestion... on ice... Samples were centrifuged

protocols.Paper_title: Mammalian reovirus, a nonfusogenic nonenveloped virus, forms size-selective pores in a model membrane
protocols.Evidence: Density Sedimentation... layered atop... Percoll... Gradients were centrifuged... tubes were washed once... then boiled with 1× Laemmli sample buffer
